title: Geepas Hand Blender | Food Collection Hand Blender, Soup Mixer with Stainless Steel Blades | Ideal for Smoothies Shakes Vegetables Baby Food Soup| Anti-Splash | 2 Year Warranty, 180W, White
features: ✅ CREATE IDEAL CONSISTENCY - This hand blender comes with perfect 180W power which fits you’re blending requirements. Great for blending dairy products, fruits, vegetables, sauces, soups, shakes, baby food and more.

✅ DETACHABLE STICK, EASY CLEANING - The stick is made of sturdy food grade, high strength ABS plastic material with durable 100% copper motor with Low noise DC motor and can be removed easily. Removable parts can be cleaned easily and convenient for minimal storage space.

✅ INJECTION SHELL, BLEND IT ALL - Ergonomic grip for easy blending and anti-splash guard for those messy meals! One speed turbo for blending smoothies, health drinks, dips, sauces and desserts in less time and for the whole family to enjoy.

✅ ANTI SPLASH STAINLESS STEEL BLADES - High-quality stainless steel blades of this handheld/stick blender allow for easy, efficient blending and reduce suction. Start blending the easy way - simply with one touch! Whether you puree, mix or chop, the blade processes your ingredients thoroughly.
description: Product Description SINGLE SPEED BUTTON Easy to use push buttons on an ergonomic handle. STAINLESS STEEL BLADES Durable and long-lasting for efficient food preparation. QUICK AND SIMPLE TO USE Remove and connect the attachments with ease. SAFETY GUARANTEED Made from sturdy, food grade, high strength ABS plastic. EASY CLEANING Removable parts can be cleaned easily and convenient for minimal storage space. BLEND LIKE A PRO This hand blender comes with perfect fits you’re grinding requirements. LOW NOISE OPERATION Durable 100% copper motor with Low noise DC motor and can be removed easily. 180W POWER This hand blender comes with perfect 180W power which fits you’re blending requirements.
